name: Quikk API
description: Quikk API — Developer-first payment orchestration API for routing transactions across multiple PSPs with smart retry and failover logic.

seo.title: Quikk API — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Quikk API: Quikk API — Developer-first payment orchestration API for routing transactions across multiple PSPs with smart retry and failover logic.

when_to_use: Smart routing across PSPs with failover for e-commerce
Developer-first orchestration with retry logic for payments
Centralizing multi-PSP management via single orchestration API

review.verdict: Orchestration layer useful at scale, but adds a dependency and only pays off with meaningful volume.
review.best_for: High-volume merchants or platforms routing across multiple PSPs for redundancy
review.not_for: Small merchants happy with a single primary PSP
